models.title: AI Model Hub
models.pull_description: Enter the model tag to download from the global Ollama repository
models.upload_description: Upload a .gguf file directly from your computer for Air-Gapped environments

recommendations.title: How to choose models?
recommendations.tag_latest: latest / no tag — Base version (usually 4-bit quantization).
recommendations.tag_tools: tools — Optimized for function calling and tool usage.
recommendations.tag_thinking: thinking / r1 — Reasoning models, better logic but slower response.
recommendations.tag_text: text — Text-only model (no chat interface wrapper).
recommendations.size_small: 1b - 3b — Fast, for entry-level PCs or basic tasks (summarization).
recommendations.size_large: 12b - 14b — High accuracy, requires 12GB+ VRAM (Mistral Nemo, Qwen 2.5).
recommendations.size_xl: 30b+ — Expert level, requires 24GB+ VRAM or powerful CPU.

documents.title: Documents
documents.confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete this document?
documents.error_unexpected_pdf_structure: The PDF recognition result had an unexpected structure. Try processing the document again.
documents.error_no_text: No text could be extracted from this document. It may contain only images or unreadable pages.
documents.error_missing_file: The source file is missing from disk. Upload the document again.

settings.title: System Settings
settings.prompt_description: Configure the initial behavior of the LLM. You should provide instructions on how the assistant should format the output and handle context.
settings.prompt_hint_text: For optimal RAG performance, instruct the model to strictly use the provided context, inform the user if the answer is missing in the text, and use Markdown formatting for references (e.g., table structure, bold text).

chat.title: Chat
chat.welcome: Hi! I'm the Documentarno AI assistant. Select a document from the list above and ask me a question.
chat.history: Chat history is kept locally in this browser.
chat.background_notice: Another chat is still generating in the background. It will continue even if this page is not open.
chat.placeholder: Ask a question about the document...

settings_actions.sync_prompt: SYNC_PROMPT (Ask Admin via Telegram before deleting)

system_state.title: System Operating Mode
system_state.description: Current global system state. Limits available operations to save resources.
system_state.logs_empty: Logs are empty or the file has not been created yet
